<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
# Dependency Update Policy

This policy defines how dependency updates are proposed, reviewed, and released.

## Update Cadence

1. Dependabot checks npm dependencies weekly.
2. Security updates with high severity are prioritized for immediate patch release.
3. Non-security updates are grouped by risk and merged in scheduled maintenance windows.

## Review Rules

1. Every dependency PR must pass lint, tests, coverage, build, and runtime audit checks.
2. Major-version updates require explicit reviewer approval and release-note impact summary.
3. Transitive dependency updates may be merged automatically only when CI passes and no runtime regressions are observed.

## Release Rules

1. Dependency-only changes use semantic patch tags by default.
2. Release workflow executes quality gates and publishes build artifacts.
3. Changelog entry must include dependency scope and any breaking behavior notes.

## Security Controls

1. Runtime dependency audit gate enforces `npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high`.
2. Secrets are never committed in dependency config or lockfiles.
3. Emergency patch flow is used for actively exploited vulnerabilities.
